mapper.select: select exists(select 1 from memberList where uId = #{uId})
select * from memberList where uId = #{uId} and uPw = #{uPw}
mapper.update:
update memberList set uPw = #{uPw}, uPhone = #{uPhone}, uZip = #{uZip}, uAddr1 = #{uAddr1}, uAddr2 = #{uAddr2}, uEmail = #{uEmail}, updatedDate = current_timestamp, updatedBy = #{updatedBy} #{uId}
where uId = #{uId}
update memberList set uLevel = '2', sName = #{sName}, sSns = #{sSns}, updatedDate = current_timestamp, updatedBy = #{uId} where uId = #{uId}
